---
title: "Cordelia Garstin"
---

## Cordelia Garstin

**Dates:** (1798/9- 3 April 1867)

### Description

step-cousin of FMY

### Biography

She was known as Delia Garstin. For her connection with Cordelia Garstin (d.1791), who had been the first wife of FMY’s father, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 33.   She was the daughter of John Bradstreet Garstin of Wakering Hall, Essex and Mary Ketchum of New Brunswick.  She died in Exeter [LG 1871 Garstin]

### Letters

- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Novr 6th 1844
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
